ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "temperature_plant1" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 1 */,
  "temperature_plant2" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 2 */,
  "temperature_plant6" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 6 */,
  "air_temp_location" REAL /* Location of the air temperature sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature reading */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reading was recorded */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation reading */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site where the reading was taken */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site where the sensor is installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "last_reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last recorded reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_info" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "acreage" REAL /* Total acreage of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil on the site */,
  "irrigation_system" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used */,
  "fertilization_schedule" TEXT /* Fertilization schedule */,
  "pest_control_plan" TEXT /* Pest control plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, agronomist, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading being analyzed */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted crop yield based on analysis */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high humidity, low temperature) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution steps taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded by the sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded by the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation reading */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, replacement) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agricultural site */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device (e.g., browser, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
